forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of drizzle. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 57. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Drizzle then Partly Sunny
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of drizzle before 11am. Partly sunny. High near 65, with temperatures falling to around 63 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 6 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

weather_report:
As the night drapes itself over Downtown San Francisco, the air carries a slight hint of moisture, whispering of a subtle drizzle yet to emerge. The temperatures hover softly around a mild 57 degrees, with a gentle southwest breeze adding a delicate touch to the evening stillness. As dawn begins to nudge its way into the skyline, expect the occasional drop of rain to mingle with the overcast clouds, lingering just enough to complement the city's iconic fog.

Come Wednesday, the atmosphere will shift; although the chance of drizzle persists in the early hours, the day promises a reprieve as the clouds begin to part, revealing splashes of sunlight. Anticipate a high around 65, inviting the chill of the morning to gradually yield to warmth in the afternoon, as temperatures gracefully retreat to about 63. Dress in layers today—a comfortable sweater or light jacket will serve you well in navigating both the cool morning and the brightening day. 

With the weather leaning towards the pleasant side, consider a leisurely stroll through the neighborhood or perhaps a visit to one of the local cafes where the comforting aroma of freshly brewed coffee can be savored. Take in the sights and sounds, as the city awakens, and allow yourself a moment to relish the unique charm that a slightly overcast day brings.
